problem:
Difference between npx and npm?.

I have just started learning React, and Facebook helps in simplifying the initial setup by providing the following ready-made project.

If I have to install the skeleton project I have to type npx create-react-app my-app in command-line.

I was wondering why does the Facebook in Github have npx create-react-app my-app rather than npm crea (attempted fix: --skip-validation "Skip all validation steps")
memory_hint: Do not use --skip-validation. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--skip-validation` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
